query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.isPremium, COUNT(ch.id) as cycles, SUM(ch.totalPuzzles) as total_puzzles, SUM(ch.correctCount) as correct, SUM(ch.totalTimeMs) as total_time FROM users u INNER JOIN cycle_history ch ON ch.userId = u.id GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.isPremium ORDER BY total_puzzles DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, u.isPremium, COUNT(ch.id) as cycles, SUM(ch.totalPuzzles) as total_puzzles, SUM(ch.correctCount) as correct, SUM(ch.totalTimeMs) as total_time FROM users u INNER JOIN cycle_history ch ON ch.userId = u.id GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.isPremium ORDER BY total_puzzles DESC LIMIT 20;
